title: xiigen.i18n-translation.account-created-extended.v1
description: Reference schema documenting the FLOW-48 extension of the FLOW-01 AccountCreated event payload (Decision 4 + C-2 review finding). The authoritative schema lives under FLOW-01's event-schemas directory; this file exists so FLOW-48 artifacts can point at the exact shape T665 TranslationRequestRegistrar consumes. FLOW-48 adds optional `acceptLanguage` — raw HTTP Accept-Language header, unparsed. T665 normalises via BCP-47 parse; a null / missing header is a no-op (CF-814).

tenantId.description: Tenant on whose subdomain the account was created (ALS at emit time).

status.description: AccountCreated always fires with status=unverified; email verification occurs in a later FLOW-01 node.

acceptLanguage.description: FLOW-48 extension (Decision 4). Raw HTTP Accept-Language header value, unparsed — e.g. 'he-IL,he;q=0.9,en;q=0.8'. T665 TranslationRequestRegistrar performs BCP-47 normalisation ('he-IL' → 'he'). null or missing header is a no-op per CF-814 — no translation request is registered and i18n.enabledLocales is not expanded.
